prompt: A hyper-realistic graphite pencil sketch in progress of a beautiful young girl with short messy bob hair, freckles, hoop earrings, and a soft closed-eye smile, resting her cheek on her hand. The sketch is placed on a white drawing sheet with pencils and art tools scattered around. A smartphone beside the drawing displays the same girl as the reference image. An artist’s hand is drawing the portrait with a pencil. Monochrome black-and-white aesthetic, ultra detailed shading, realistic skin texture, soft lighting, cozy artistic workspace, top-down angle, masterpiece sketch art, highly detailed graphite strokes, emotional and calming vibe.
